nodes.label: User taps app icon
nodes.description: Cold launch from launcher

nodes.label: index.ts boot
nodes.description: Initialize SQLite, mount Cache/master.db, set up navigation

nodes.label: Cache reconciliation
nodes.description: Walk data tree, verify Cache/master.db rows match folders, rebuild missing entries (Section 30.8.3)

nodes.label: First launch?
nodes.description: Check if Profile/Keys/private.key exists

nodes.label: Privacy Pledge screen
nodes.description: Local-first, no servers, your data is yours

nodes.label: Generate identity keypair
nodes.description: X25519 + Ed25519. Write Profile/Keys/private.key + public.key

nodes.label: Back up your key prompt
nodes.description: Lose your key = lose identity. QR / file export / cloud

nodes.label: Pick default activity type
nodes.description: Set initial defaults: gravel, road, run, hike, walk, MTB

nodes.label: Incomplete recording on disk?
nodes.description: Check master cache for is_complete=0 (crash recovery, Section 30.12)

nodes.label: Resume / Discard / Save as-is
nodes.description: User decides what to do with the orphan recording

nodes.label: Bottom tab navigator
nodes.description: Record / Activities / Profile (App.tsx)

nodes.label: Record tab (idle)
nodes.description: Live map, dot, accuracy ring, status indicators

nodes.label: Top-left status stack
nodes.description: Persistent indicators (Section 20.13.1)

nodes.label: GPS Signal Strength bar
nodes.description: 4-5 segments. Color shifts amber/red as accuracy worsens

nodes.label: Barometer indicator
nodes.description: Mountain glyph. Bright when subscribed, dim when off, hidden if no baro hardware

nodes.label: Map widget (MapLibre)
nodes.description: Fully imperative camera, OpenFreeMap tiles

nodes.label: User location dot
nodes.description: Section 20.12 GPS Dot Appearance

nodes.label: Live polyline (ring buffer)
nodes.description: Last 500 points, drawn behind dot (PERF-001)

nodes.label: Compass widget (bottom-left)
nodes.description: Reads mapHeading, rotates needle. Section 23

nodes.label: Camera button stack (right edge)
nodes.description: Section 20.3 button conventions

nodes.label: Recenter button
nodes.description: Owns all 4 dimensions. Resets position, zoom, rotation, tilt

nodes.label: Lock Mode button
nodes.description: Hard lock — disables panning, dot stays centered

nodes.label: Rotation button (N ↔ Free)
nodes.description: Heading mode removed April 2026

nodes.label: Tilt Reset button
nodes.description: Returns pitch to 0

nodes.label: Fit To button
nodes.description: Frames recorded route bounds + current dot

nodes.label: Activity Type picker
nodes.description: Modal — pick what you're doing

nodes.label: Activity types preset list
nodes.description: Gravel, Road, MTB, Trail Run, Run, Hike, Walk, Multi

nodes.label: Accuracy Profile picker
nodes.description: Modal — pick GPS rate / accuracy tradeoff

nodes.label: Accuracy profiles
nodes.description: Off-Grid 10s/5m, Standard 3s/3m, High Fidelity 1s/1m, Custom

nodes.label: Record button (large, center)
nodes.description: Tap to start recording

nodes.label: Location permission granted?
nodes.description: expo-location permission check

nodes.label: Permission request flow
nodes.description: Trailcraft asks for foreground + background location. PRIVACY-001 already mitigated.

nodes.label: saveActivityStarted
nodes.description: Insert activity row with is_complete=0 in master + per-activity DB

nodes.label: Recording active state
nodes.description: All subsequent ticks write to activity.db + baro_readings

nodes.label: GPS tick handler
nodes.description: expo-location callback at profile rate (1s / 3s / 10s)

nodes.label: Chip speed gate
nodes.description: Check STATIONARY_SPEED_MPS (0.15) and MOVING_TIME_SPEED_MPS (0.3)

nodes.label: Compute distance increment
nodes.description: haversine from last point if not stationary

nodes.label: Update moving_time accumulator
nodes.description: Only when chip speed >= MOVING_TIME_SPEED_MPS

nodes.label: Write track_point row
nodes.description: saveTrackPoint → activity.db (single connection)

nodes.label: Push to polyline ring buffer
nodes.description: Last 500 points only (PERF-001)

nodes.label: Update live tiles
nodes.description: Distance, time, moving time, elevation, speed

nodes.label: Barometer enabled in Profile?
nodes.description: Read AsyncStorage key barometer.enabled (default true)

nodes.label: Baro 1Hz callback
nodes.description: sensorManager.startElevationTracking — foreground only (Architecture Rule 5)

nodes.label: saveBaroReading
nodes.description: Write row to baro_readings table, decoupled from GPS tick

nodes.label: User taps Stop?
nodes.description: Stop button is part of recording controls bar

nodes.label: Save/Delete dialog (always)
nodes.description: User MUST choose. cancelable: false. No auto-deletion.

nodes.label: Save?
nodes.description: User choice

nodes.label: Delete activity folder
nodes.description: Atomic. Removes from master cache.

nodes.label: finalizeActivity
nodes.description: Write final stats: distance, gain/loss, durations, max_speed, calories

nodes.label: correctActivityElevation
nodes.description: Kalman smoothing + Baro GPS Calibration (lib/elevationService.ts)

nodes.label: < 2 GPS points?
nodes.description: Early exit guard

nodes.label: Source selection: getBestAvailableSource
nodes.description: baro_gps if any baro data + device has barometer, else gps_smoothed

nodes.label: markActivityElevationCorrected
nodes.description: Write elevation_source + smoothed_altitude + hybrid_altitude

nodes.label: Activity finalized (is_complete=1)
nodes.description: Folder renamed to final form YYYY-MM-DD_HHMMh_Type. Master cache updated.

nodes.label: Activities tab
nodes.description: List from Cache/master.db. Sort, filter, search. NEEDS SPEC PASS

nodes.label: Activity list row
nodes.description: Type icon, name, date, distance, duration

nodes.label: Filter / search bar
nodes.description: By type, by date range, by friend (shared), by text

nodes.label: Sort options
nodes.description: Date desc/asc, distance, duration, type

nodes.label: Activity Detail screen
nodes.description: Tap any list row → here. Main read view for an activity.

nodes.label: Header — title + date
nodes.description: Display name + start time. Tap to edit name

nodes.label: Map panel
nodes.description: Recorded route polyline, photo pins, start/end markers

nodes.label: Stats grid
nodes.description: Distance, time, moving time, elev gain/loss, avg/max speed, calories

nodes.label: Source badge (above graph)
nodes.description: Shows current source: 🔵 Baro / 📡 GPS smoothed / ⚠ GPS raw / ✓ imported

nodes.label: Elevation graph
nodes.description: Source-switchable. Distance X axis. Baro anchor dots if source=baro_gps

nodes.label: Source picker modal
nodes.description: ELEV-001 interim (Phase 2.3a): live in-memory recompute. Full Section 29 gated on Phase 1.5.

nodes.label: Baro coverage %
nodes.description: Shown when source=baro_gps. % of duration with baro readings.

nodes.label: Speed graph
nodes.description: Adaptive sampling. Distance X axis. UI-002 graph quality still pending.

nodes.label: Media gallery
nodes.description: Photos + video clips from Media/. Tap for fullscreen.

nodes.label: Notes panel
nodes.description: private.md + public.md + from_<friend>.md files, rendered as markdown

nodes.label: Edit notes (markdown editor)
nodes.description: Tap a note → markdown editor

nodes.label: Witness row
nodes.description: Avatars of friends who Saw this activity (Section 17)

nodes.label: Activity menu (3-dot)
nodes.description: Edit, share, change type, delete, export GPX

nodes.label: Change activity type
nodes.description: Folder atomic rename. Propagates to friends with shared copies on next sync.

nodes.label: Rename activity (display name)
nodes.description: Edits activity.db field, NOT folder name

nodes.label: Share with friend(s)
nodes.description: Per-friend or all-friends. Subject to permissions.json + inheritance rule

nodes.label: Export GPX (on-demand)
nodes.description: Generates from activity.db, writes to user-picked location (Section 30.11)

nodes.label: Delete activity
nodes.description: Confirmation dialog. Removes folder + master row.

nodes.label: Profile tab
nodes.description: My profile object + Settings + Friends + Identity

nodes.label: My profile card
nodes.description: Avatar, display name, bio (public.md)

nodes.label: Settings
nodes.description: Multiple sub-settings. Section 19.

nodes.label: Barometer toggle
nodes.description: AsyncStorage barometer.enabled (Phase 2.3a)

nodes.label: appear_as_witness toggle
nodes.description: User-level: do my views register as Witness on friends' objects? Default true. Section 17.

nodes.label: Default sharing modes
nodes.description: Per-activity-type defaults: all / last 30 / last N / manual / none

nodes.label: Units (imperial / metric)
nodes.description: Phase 3.1

nodes.label: Default accuracy profile
nodes.description: Persisted as lastAccuracyProfile

nodes.label: Vault Mode toggle
nodes.description: Section 9. Set password, encrypts all on-device data at rest.

nodes.label: Backup / Restore
nodes.description: User-driven, free. SAF (Android) / share sheet (iOS). Section 30.15.

nodes.label: Export identity (key backup)
nodes.description: QR or file. Critical — lose key = lose identity.

nodes.label: Rebuild Cache
nodes.description: Wipes Cache/master.db and re-runs reconciliation from data tree

nodes.label: Friends list
nodes.description: All paired friends, last synced timestamp

nodes.label: Add Friend (start pairing)
nodes.description: Section 25 — QR code key exchange

nodes.label: Show my QR
nodes.description: Public key encoded as QR for friend to scan

nodes.label: Scan friend's QR
nodes.description: Camera opens, decodes their pubkey

nodes.label: Verify key_hint match
nodes.description: Both sides cross-check 8 hex chars to detect MITM

nodes.label: Create friend folder
nodes.description: Profile/Friends/DisplayName_keyhash8/ with identity.json

nodes.label: Friend Profile view
nodes.description: Tap a friend → see their bio, public activities, public routes via manifest

nodes.label: Per-friend sharing controls
nodes.description: sharing_settings.json — what I share with this friend by default

nodes.label: Block / unfriend
nodes.description: Open spec gap. Future work.

nodes.label: Sync handshake (start)
nodes.description: Triggered by friend tap, Bluetooth discovery, or scheduled poll

nodes.label: Transport available?
nodes.description: BT / WiFi Direct in-person, or cloud relay if paid tier

nodes.label: Bluetooth pairing
nodes.description: Short-range. Discovery via BLE.

nodes.label: WiFi Direct
nodes.description: Larger payloads. Auto-negotiated for big content.

nodes.label: Cloud relay (paid)
nodes.description: Async transport. Same crypto. Section 28.

nodes.label: Exchange manifests
nodes.description: Small JSON: what's new since last sync (per Section 5 + audit proposal)

nodes.label: Manifest JSON contents
nodes.description: available_objects[], interactions[], from, to, since timestamps

nodes.label: Per-friend auto-pull setting
nodes.description: Auto-pull everything / manifest only (manual pull) / text only

nodes.label: Auto-pull objects
nodes.description: Fetch encrypted content blobs, decrypt with my privkey

nodes.label: 'Alice has 3 new items' card
nodes.description: User taps to inspect & pull selectively

nodes.label: Apply incoming interactions
nodes.description: Witness receipts, trail notes, joint proposals, permission updates

nodes.label: Identity = X25519+Ed25519 keypair
nodes.description: Section 31.1. Generated first launch. Backup is critical.

nodes.label: Two cloud roles
nodes.description: Vault (only you) vs Inbox (friends drop encrypted messages). Section 31.2.

nodes.label: Restricted message protocol
nodes.description: 7 message types only: object.share, interaction.note/witness/joint, permission.update, identity.rotate, revocation. Section 31.3.

nodes.label: Send object to friend
nodes.description: Encrypt bundle (Data + Media + Notes + permissions) with friend's pubkey, sign with mine

nodes.label: Restrictive permissions?
nodes.description: view: owner_only/specific_friends + re_share: no?

nodes.label: Wrap as .craft envelope
nodes.description: Routes always. Restrictive activities also (proposed Section 31 expansion).

nodes.label: Plain encrypted bundle
nodes.description: Permissive content — still E2E encrypted in transit

nodes.label: Transmit
nodes.description: Same wire format regardless of transport. Section 31.5.

nodes.label: Friend receives
nodes.description: Decrypts with their privkey, verifies my signature

nodes.label: Signature valid?
nodes.description: Reject if forged or tampered

nodes.label: Drop message
nodes.description: Untrusted source or tampering detected

nodes.label: Apply per protocol rules
nodes.description: Write only to allowed paths in Shared_Activities / Shared_Routes / from_<sender>.md etc.

nodes.label: Read/write segregation
nodes.description: Friends never write to your tree directly — they send messages, YOUR app interprets per Section 31.6

nodes.label: Known-friends-only by default
nodes.description: Strangers' messages dropped at protocol layer. Pairing is the trust event. Section 31.8.

nodes.label: Trailcraft/
nodes.description: Root. Lives at expo-sqlite-accessible path (iOS Documents, Android app-specific external). Section 30.2.

nodes.label: Cache/
nodes.description: Regenerable index. Never source of truth.

nodes.label: master.db
nodes.description: objects, interactions, friends tables. Rebuilt by reconciliation.

nodes.label: thumbnails/
nodes.description: Generated thumbnails for grid views

nodes.label: Profile/
nodes.description: Identity + relationships

nodes.label: My_Profile/
nodes.description: Universal object shape (Data/Media/Notes/permissions.json)

nodes.label: Settings/
nodes.description: user.db: barometer.enabled, appear_as_witness, units, default profile, default sharing modes

nodes.label: Keys/
nodes.description: private.key (vault-encrypted if Vault Mode), public.key, vault.verifier

nodes.label: Friends/
nodes.description: One folder per paired friend

nodes.label: Alice_a3f9c2b1/
nodes.description: DisplayName_keyhash8. Hash stable, name editable.

nodes.label: identity.json
nodes.description: Alice's pubkey, key_hash, first/last sync

nodes.label: sharing_settings.json
nodes.description: What I share with Alice by default

nodes.label: Profile/ (Alice's)
nodes.description: Alice's profile object — same Data/Media/Notes/permissions shape

nodes.label: manifests/
nodes.description: Last-known manifest from Alice (for 'what's new since' UI)

nodes.label: Activities/
nodes.description: All activity objects

nodes.label: My_Activities/
nodes.description: I own these

nodes.label: Shared_Activities/
nodes.description: Per-friend subfolders of activities they shared with me

nodes.label: 2026-05-08_1402h_Gravel/
nodes.description: Example single. YYYY-MM-DD_HHMMh_Type naming.

nodes.label: 2026-05-05_1307h_Gravel-Hike-Run/
nodes.description: Multi-activity. Type segment lists subs chronologically.

nodes.label: Routes/
nodes.description: All route objects

nodes.label: My_Routes/
nodes.description: Routes I made / imported. route.db SQLite.

nodes.label: Shared_Routes/
nodes.description: Friends' routes — always route.craft, encrypted at rest

nodes.label: [Object Folder] (universal)
nodes.description: Activity / Route / Profile all share this shape. Section 30.4.

nodes.label: Data/
nodes.description: activity.db OR route.db OR route.craft OR profile.db

nodes.label: Media/
nodes.description: Photos, videos, audio. Originals preserved.

nodes.label: Notes/
nodes.description: Markdown files. private + public + from_<friend>

nodes.label: permissions.json
nodes.description: view, discoverable, leave_public_notes, re_share, export_gpx

nodes.label: public.md
nodes.description: Owner's caption — syncs

nodes.label: private.md
nodes.description: Owner's diary — NEVER syncs (path-based privacy)

nodes.label: from_<friend>.md
nodes.description: Friend's public note. One per noter.

nodes.label: Permissions schema (Section 30.7)
nodes.description: Per-object permissions.json. Applies uniformly to Activity/Route/Profile.

nodes.label: view
nodes.description: trail_friends / specific_friends / public / owner_only

nodes.label: discoverable
nodes.description: Boolean. Only meaningful when view=public. Default false (privacy-first).

nodes.label: leave_public_notes
nodes.description: Same options as view, plus anyone_who_can_view

nodes.label: re_share
nodes.description: trail_friends / specific_friends / no. Activities + Routes only.

nodes.label: export_gpx
nodes.description: Boolean. Activities + Routes only.

nodes.label: Inheritance rule (Section 30.7.5)
nodes.description: Derived object's view ≤ source's view. Activity from restricted route inherits the ceiling.

nodes.label: Local heatmap (V1)
nodes.description: Section 32.2. Your activities + friends' shared activities, rendered locally.

nodes.label: Track color overlay
nodes.description: Section 32.1. Map line colored by elevation/speed/grade. Both mobile + desktop.

nodes.label: Desktop companion (Phase 7.1)
nodes.description: Section 32.3. Reads same Trailcraft/ folder. No separate sync model.

nodes.label: DEM only on desktop
nodes.description: Phone is sensor-only. DEM = route builder feature on desktop. Section 32.3.5.

nodes.label: Joint activities (proposed)
nodes.description: Auto-detect overlap + manual mark. Bidirectional link via joint_with field. Needs spec.

nodes.label: Manifest sync (proposed)
nodes.description: Don't auto-dump on sync — exchange a small JSON manifest first, user pulls selectively.

nodes.label: Activity type change post-recording
nodes.description: Folder atomic rename, propagate to friends as metadata-only event. Needs spec.

nodes.label: Public/Private profile UX
nodes.description: view: public + discoverable: true → friend search. Needs UX spec.

nodes.label: RECOMMENDATION: Settle Section 17 audit
nodes.description: Cleaned in this audit. Section 17 now clean. Section 32 created.

nodes.label: RECOMMENDATION: Build Phase 1.5 next
nodes.description: File architecture rebuild unblocks ELEV-001 full, joint activities, manifest sync, all sharing

nodes.label: RECOMMENDATION: Lock crypto algorithm choice early
nodes.description: Pick X25519/Ed25519 via libsodium binding. Section 31.9.

nodes.label: RECOMMENDATION: Friend-pairing UX session before sync work
nodes.description: Section 25 has technical layer only. UX flow unspecced.

nodes.label: RECOMMENDATION: Spec Activities screen overhaul
nodes.description: Sort/filter/search/edit/multi-select all unspecced. Blocks UI work.

nodes.label: RECOMMENDATION: Data tile spec session
nodes.description: Blocks Phase 5.1, blocks GPS strength + baro indicators implementation

nodes.label: RECOMMENDATION: Field test analysis methodology
nodes.description: Decision tree for Garmin disagreement before next ride. ~20 min spec.

nodes.label: RECOMMENDATION: Onboarding flow detail spec
nodes.description: Privacy pledge, keypair gen UX, backup prompt — Section is brief, needs detail
